zh.lifeSummary: 當Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra於1290年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，她的父親Duque Roberto II de Borgoña42歲，母親Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña30歲。她於1305年9月23日與Rey Luis X de Francia在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌可貝爾-頌結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年4月30日在法國諾門迪享年25歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾托納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra于1290年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，她的父亲Duque Roberto II de Borgoña42岁，母亲Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña30岁。她于1305年9月23日与Rey Luis X de Francia在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌可貝爾-頌结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年4月30日在法国諾門迪享年25岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾托納。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Borgoña
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: nickname from northern dialect borgna, feminine of borgno ‘blind in one eye’ (from French borgne). This surname is also found in southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Margarita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Margaret  , now widely adopted in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra was born in 1290, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Duque Roberto II de Borgoña, was 42 and her mother, Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, was 30. She married Rey Luis X de Francia on 23 September 1305, in Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 30 April 1315, in Normandy, France, at the age of 25, and was buried in Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra est née en 1290, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Duque Roberto II de Borgoña, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Luis X de Francia le 23 septembre 1305, à Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 avril 1315, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra 1290 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duque Roberto II de Borgoña 42 und ihre Mutter Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña 30. Sie hat am 23. September 1305 in Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich Rey Luis X de Francia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. April 1315 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra è nata il nel 1290 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Duque Roberto II de Borgoña, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Rey Luis X de Francia il 23 settembre 1305, nel Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 30 aprile 1315, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarraが1290年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Duque Roberto II de Borgoñaは42歳，母Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoñaは30歳であった。1305年9月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンコルベイル-エソンでRey Luis X de Franciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1315年4月30日にフランスノーマンディで25歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントネアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra(이)가 1290년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duque Roberto II de Borgoña(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1305년 9월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 코르브이-손에서 Rey Luis X de Francia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 4월 30일 프랑스 노먼디에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 토너르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra nasceu em 1290, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Duque Roberto II de Borgoña, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Luis X de Francia em 23 de setembro de 1305, em Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de abril de 1315, em Normandie, França, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra родилась в 1290 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Duque Roberto II de Borgoña было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Luis X de Francia 23 сентября 1305 г. в местности корбил-ессонн, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 апреля 1315 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности тоннирр, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra nació en 1290, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Duque Roberto II de Borgoña, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Rey Luis X de Francia el 23 de septiembre de 1305, en Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 30 de abril de 1315, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Tonnerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
